TriageRecord.title: TriageRecord
TriageRecord.description: A patient triage analysis record saved by a healthcare worker

userId.description: Email of the user who saved this record

triageStatus.description: AI predicted triage level: RED, AMBER, GREEN

timestamp.description: Date and time the record was created

ManagementRecord.title: ManagementRecord
ManagementRecord.description: A district health centre management report saved by an administrator

userId.description: Email of the administrator who saved this report

description.description: Original raw center status report text

metrics.description: Daily metrics: footfall, beds, doctors, tests

stockWarnings.description: Early stock-out warnings predicted by AI

demandForecasts.description: Demand surge forecasts predicted by AI

flaggedCentres.description: Flagged warning health centres and reasons

timestamp.description: Date and time the report was created

/triage_records/{recordId}.description: Collection of patient triage records saved by authenticated users

/management_records/{recordId}.description: Collection of center management reports saved by authenticated administrators
